heading: Attributes
body:
It has the following attributes:

| Name    | Type    | Required? | Description                                                                    |
| ------- | ------- | --------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| type    | string  | yes       | Human-readable label that identifies this tokenizer type. Value must be nGram. |
| minGram | integer | yes       | Number of characters to include in the shortest token created.                 |
| maxGram | integer | yes       | Number of characters to include in the longest token created.                  |
